nasb.text: So he said, “What then is to be done for her?” And Gehazi answered, “Truly she has no son and her husband is old.”

esv.text: And he said, “What then is to be done for her?” Gehazi answered, “Well, she has no son, and her husband is old.”

cnv.text: 於是他說：“我到底可以為她作些甚麼呢？”基哈西說：“她沒有兒子，而她的丈夫又老了。”

ccb.text: 以利沙问基哈西：“我们能为她做什么呢？”基哈西说：“她没有儿子，丈夫也已经老了。”
